tasks.label: Notebooks: install deps
tasks.detail: Create azure/.venv with the notebook extras (azure-monitor-query, pandas, ipywidgets, jupyterlab). Pick azure/.venv as the notebook kernel afterwards.

tasks.label: Notebooks: launch Jupyter Lab
tasks.detail: Open the engagement notebooks in Jupyter Lab in the browser (uses azure/.venv; run 'Notebooks: install deps' first).
tasks.command: uv run --extra notebooks jupyter lab notebooks/
